hero.headline: Your Revenue Engine Is an Architecture Problem.
hero.subhead: I'm Richard Norwood — a certified PMP and Revenue Architect. I install Unified Commercial Engines that use Information Fusion to automate perception, eliminate the Manual Entry Tax, and turn your digital presence into a high-value financial asset on your balance sheet.

ideology.title: The 5-Stage Revenue Journey
ideology.subtitle: The Unified Commercial Engine accompanies your buyer through a non-linear journey — from invisible signal to compounding advocacy. Each stage is powered by Information Fusion and engineered to maximize Information Velocity.

stages.title: Awareness
stages.subtitle: The Perimeter
stages.description: 83% of the buyer journey happens before you're ever contacted. We deploy Perimeter Architecture — optimized social profiles and link-in-bio hubs — as Signal Nodes that capture intent from the Dark Funnel without friction.

stages.title: Consideration
stages.subtitle: The Gateway
stages.description: We bridge the Maturity Gap with Gateway Microsites — precision-engineered deliberation sandboxes that teach buyers how to evaluate their own architecture using your proprietary rubric. This is where the 'Aha Moment' is manufactured.

stages.title: Decision
stages.subtitle: The Core
stages.description: Your Digital Sales Channel replaces the static brochure with an Authority Engine — housing case studies, diagnostic tools, and Proof-as-a-Service widgets that resolve objections before they're ever voiced. The Risk Tax is eliminated.

stages.title: Conversion
stages.subtitle: Seamless Activation
stages.description: Speed to Lead is the most unforgiving variable. We automate Quote-to-Cash with Information Velocity — a 5-minute response delay causes 10x decay in qualification. Your engine activates instantly at the moment of Mutual Commit.

stages.title: Retention
stages.subtitle: The Infinity Loop
stages.description: The close is the center of the Bowtie, not the finish line. We install a Managed Nervous System that monitors usage telemetry, triggers expansion playbooks at peak impact, and drives 110%+ Net Revenue Retention.

social_proof.title: From Frankenstein Stack to Unified Engine
social_proof.description: Every agency we guide serves as a living case study — documenting the ascent from Fragmented operations through the Maturity Staircase to Commercial Sovereignty. The data doesn't lie; the architecture works.

about.title: The Navigator
about.name: Richard Norwood, PMP
about.bio: Most consultants fix your marketing — the paint job. I fix your Architecture — the engine. Operating as your Air Traffic Controller, I merge PMBOK governance with the Revenue Journey Framework to install the Managed Nervous System that gives you Situation Awareness, kills the Manual Entry Tax, and proves the Unified Commercial Engine philosophy before a single line of sovereign infrastructure is deployed.
